scope.target: Portable, fail-closed execution of the sanctioned v0.5.0 pre-tag critical gate
constraints: Keep the critical command allowlist exact
Resolve Git Bash on Windows without selecting the WSL launcher
Provide Git usr/bin only to the child process without mutating the parent environment
Decode subprocess bytes deterministically without reader-thread failures
Return deterministic failure details even when streams are empty
Keep v0.4.2 as an exact automatic upgrade source
Do not create or publish a tag
non_goals: Change release compatibility or migration semantics

steps: Resolve the active Windows Git installation to its Git Bash executable
Prepend the selected Git installation's usr/bin to the child environment
Merge and prove the real pre-tag command on main
Close lifecycle records on a continuation branch
validation: hosted package, governance, and Ubuntu gates
execution.last_completed_step: PR #2 merged final candidate 47aa1cc as main@540cd029. The unrestricted sanctioned pre-tag command passed there, reported exact automatic sources v0.3.0, v0.4.0, v0.4.1, and v0.4.2 plus the user-declared model identity, and did not create a tag.
execution.next_action: Await separate owner authorization before annotated tag creation; if authorized, resume the governed tag phase with the exact command printed on main@540cd029.

results.summary: The bounded shell resolver, child environment, byte decoder, and combined-stream diagnostics are implemented and verified locally, hosted, independently, and through the real merged-main pre-tag command.
tests_run: live Windows shell resolution: C:\Program Files\Git\bin\bash.exe
sandbox critical attempt: shell and decoding passed; three dotnet test restores failed with NU1301 network denial
unrestricted pre-tag runner critical gate at 958da6e: 33/33 passed, 0 failed, 0 deferred, 56 dotnet tests passed
exact candidate c53e1bf critical gate: 33/33 passed, 0 failed, 0 deferred
independent bounded audit of c53e1bf: no implementation blocker; one low-severity roadmap summary omission reconciled
final candidate 47aa1cc critical gate: 33/33 passed, 0 failed, 0 deferred
hosted package run 29883289326, governance run 29883289335, and Ubuntu run 29883289321 passed
unrestricted sanctioned pre-tag on main@540cd029 passed; no tag was created
results.residual_risk: The sandbox cannot reach NuGet repository-signature endpoints, so local full gates that require restore must run with approved network access. Tag creation and publication remain separately owner-authorized lifecycle phases, not residual defects in REL-002.
